race.comment: CYCLONE HARMONY (2) caught the eye with a big finish on the turf here last time, charging home off a slow speed into third, beaten 1.1 lengths. He's a winner here on the synthetic and should prove very hard to hold out late. QUITE THE LASS (3) is racing well, winning at Werribee when last seen 32 days ago. She's raced well on the synthetic and should be right there again. LUCKETT (1) is going nicely of late, too good last time having chased home QUITE THE LASS at Bairnsdale prior. He can improve again and draws well. UP AND UNDER (4) struggled up in class on heavy last time - forgive that and go off the win prior which has him in the finish. DJOCKOVIC (13) doesn't win many but has the class to figure here.
